# Task

## Summary

Describe the bug, feature, test gap, or documentation task.

## Files

List the main files you expect to touch.

## Steps Taken

- [ ] Read the relevant contract/module.
- [ ] Added or updated tests.
- [ ] Ran the verification commands.

## Reproduction Or Test

Include the command or test name that demonstrates the issue or validates the fix.

## PR

Link the pull request when ready.
